summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Kyoto Ame sushi delivery app. Backend 4/4 tests pass (menu list, order create valid, order empty -> 400, order listing sorted desc with no _id leakage). Frontend all key user flows work: sushi-loader shows and disappears, hero renders in ES by default with working CTAs, ES/EN toggle switches copy, chef-mascot always visible, 10 menu cards render, filter-rolls narrows to 2 roll cards, add-to-cart updates cart-count-badge and shows chef-bubble, floating-cart-button opens cart-drawer, inc/dec/remove work, checkout form submits to POST /api/orders and order-confirmation displays with open-whatsapp-link pointing to wa.me/5352473962 with correctly formatted message.
action_items: OPTIONAL (naming consistency): Review-request spec expected data-testids cart-inc-{id}, cart-dec-{id}, cart-remove-{id} but implementation uses inc-{id}-button, dec-{id}-button, remove-{id}-button. Functionality works; either rename attributes or update spec.

OPTIONAL (naming consistency): Spec expected checkout-name-input, checkout-phone-input, checkout-address-input, checkout-submit-button but implementation uses customer-name-input, customer-phone-input, customer-address-input, send-whatsapp-button. Functionality verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py stores created_at as ISO string in Mongo then parses back for response_model=List[Order]; works but inconsistent with typical datetime persistence. Consider storing as native BSON datetime.
POST /api/orders does not validate total matches sum(items price*qty); client-provided total is trusted.
No pagination on GET /api/orders (capped at 200). Fine for MVP.
seed_data_creation: Two TEST_Kenji orders created via POST /api/orders during backend tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Playwright must use the ACTUAL testids in code: inc-{id}-button, dec-{id}-button, remove-{id}-button for drawer controls and customer-name-input, customer-phone-input, customer-address-input, customer-notes-input, send-whatsapp-button for checkout. WhatsApp number confirmed as wa.me/5352473962. The order confirmation modal auto-opens after submission; verifying open-whatsapp-link href is sufficient.
